title: Claude Code Plugin Hooks
description: Schema for validating hooks.json files used by Claude Code plugins

description.description: Human-readable description of what these hooks do
examples: Validates Claude Code skill structure after files are written or edited

hooksMap.description: Map of hook event names to arrays of matcher/handler entries. Known events: SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse, PermissionRequest, PostToolUse, PostToolUseFailure, Notification, SubagentStart, SubagentStop, Stop, TeammateIdle, TaskCompleted, ConfigChange, WorktreeCreate, WorktreeRemove, PreCompact, SessionEnd, Setup, InstructionsLoaded.

hookEntryArray.description: Array of hook entries for a given event. Each entry pairs a matcher with one or more hook handlers.

hookEntry.description: A matcher with one or more hook handlers to execute when it fires

matcher.description: Tool name, pipe-separated list of tool names, or glob pattern to match against the event. Use an empty string or omit to match all occurrences.

hooks.description: Hook handlers to execute when the matcher fires

hookHandler.description: A hook handler — a shell command, HTTP endpoint, LLM prompt, or agent that runs when the matcher matches.

oneOf.description: Command hook: runs a shell command. Receives JSON input on stdin.

command.description: Shell command or script path to execute. Use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} to reference paths relative to the plugin root.

async.description: If true, runs in the background without blocking.

statusMessage.description: Custom spinner message displayed while the hook runs.

once.description: If true, runs only once per session then is removed. Skills only.

oneOf.description: HTTP hook: sends event JSON as a POST request to a URL.

url.description: URL to send the POST request to.

headers.description: Additional HTTP headers. Values support env var interpolation via $VAR or ${VAR} (only variables listed in allowedEnvVars are resolved).

allowedEnvVars.description: Environment variable names allowed in header interpolation. Unlisted variables resolve to empty strings. Credential-shaped names (containing KEY, TOKEN, SECRET, PASSWORD, or CREDENTIAL) are blocked by the DMZ validator and should not appear here.

not.description: Credential-shaped variable names must not be forwarded via HTTP hooks — they will be exfiltrated to the hook's URL

statusMessage.description: Custom spinner message displayed while the hook runs.

once.description: If true, runs only once per session then is removed. Skills only.

oneOf.description: Prompt hook: sends a prompt to a Claude model for single-turn yes/no evaluation.

prompt.description: Prompt text for single-turn LLM evaluation.

model.description: Model to use for prompt evaluation.

statusMessage.description: Custom spinner message displayed while the hook runs.

once.description: If true, runs only once per session then is removed. Skills only.

oneOf.description: Agent hook: spawns a subagent that can use tools to verify conditions before returning a decision.

model.description: Model to use for agent evaluation.

tools.description: Tools the agent can use (e.g. Read, Grep, Glob).

statusMessage.description: Custom spinner message displayed while the hook runs.

once.description: If true, runs only once per session then is removed. Skills only.

examples.description: Session lifecycle hooks with timeout configuration
